name: sendcloud
description: Create shipping labels, list shipments, compare carrier shipping options, and track parcels via the Sendcloud multi-carrier shipping API

envVars.name: SENDCLOUD_PUBLIC_KEY
envVars.description: Sendcloud API public key, used as the HTTP Basic username

envVars.name: SENDCLOUD_SECRET_KEY
envVars.description: Sendcloud API secret key, used as the HTTP Basic password

tools.name: List Shipments
tools.description: List shipments (parcels) in the Sendcloud account with optional filters such as order number, tracking number, or update time

order_number.description: Only return shipments with this order number

tracking_number.description: Only return the shipment with this carrier tracking number

external_reference_id.description: Only return shipments with this external reference ID

updated_after.description: Only shipments updated on or after this ISO 8601 timestamp, e.g. 2026-06-01T00:00:00Z

updated_before.description: Only shipments updated before this ISO 8601 timestamp

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's Link header

tools.name: Get Shipment
tools.description: Get a single shipment with its parcels, addresses, tracking numbers, and label documents

shipmentId.description: ID of the shipment to retrieve

tools.name: Create Shipment
tools.description: Create and announce a shipment synchronously, generating a shipping label for one or more parcels

to_address.description: Destination address: name, address_line_1, house_number, postal_code, city, country_code, and optionally email and phone_number

ship_with.description: Shipping selection, e.g. { "type": "shipping_option_code", "properties": { "shipping_option_code": "..." } } from the List Shipping Options tool

parcels.description: 1-15 parcel objects with dimensions { length, width, height, unit } and weight { value, unit }

from_address.description: Origin address: provide either { "sender_address_id": <id> } referencing a sender address configured in the panel, or the full address fields directly

order_number.description: Order number to associate with the shipment

customs_information.description: Customs details, required for international shipments outside customs unions

external_reference_id.description: Your own unique reference for idempotency and later lookup

tools.name: List Shipping Options
tools.description: List available carrier shipping options (methods) for a given route and parcel, optionally with price quotes

from_address.description: Origin address with at least country_code and postal_code

to_address.description: Destination address with at least country_code and postal_code

parcels.description: 1-50 parcel objects with dimensions and weight used to filter applicable options

carrier_code.description: Only return options for this carrier, e.g. dhl, dpd, postnl

calculate_quotes.description: Include price quotes per shipping option (slower)

tools.name: Get Tracking
tools.description: Get the current status and recent tracking events of a parcel by its carrier tracking number

trackingNumber.description: Carrier tracking number of the parcel

tools.name: Cancel Shipment
tools.description: Cancel an announced shipment and its label before carrier collection — the undo for a mis-announced (cost-incurring) label; cancellation is no longer possible once the carrier has the parcel

shipmentId.description: Shipment ID from Create Shipment or List Shipments

prompts.title: Track a parcel
prompts.prompt: Track a Sendcloud parcel by its tracking number and summarize its current status and latest events.

prompts.title: Recent shipments
prompts.prompt: List my most recent Sendcloud shipments and flag any that look stuck or undelivered.

prompts.title: Compare shipping options
prompts.prompt: Given an origin, destination, and parcel size, list the available Sendcloud shipping options with quotes and recommend the cheapest suitable one.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Sendcloud API setup

steps.title: Create a Sendcloud account
steps.description: Sign up at https://app.sendcloud.com — a free plan is available and is enough to test the API against your own account.

steps.title: Create API keys
steps.description: In the Sendcloud panel open Settings → Integrations (https://app.sendcloud.com/v2/settings/integrations/manage), find 'Sendcloud API' in the list, click Connect, and give the integration a name. You receive a public key and a secret key.

steps.title: Store the keys
steps.description: Add SENDCLOUD_PUBLIC_KEY and SENDCLOUD_SECRET_KEY to your .env file. The API uses HTTP Basic auth with the public key as username and the secret key as password.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Shipments tool. An empty data array is a valid response for a new account.

notes: Always use API v3 (https://panel.sendcloud.sc/api/v3/...) for new integrations — Sendcloud is migrating integrations from v2 to v3
Creating a shipment announces it to the carrier and may incur label costs; configure a sender address in the panel first
List Shipping Options is a POST request but is read-only — it only calculates available options and quotes
